templates.name: Request Order ID
templates.description: Ask customer to provide order or transaction ID for billing lookup.
templates.reply_body_template: Thank you for contacting support. To process your request, please provide your order ID: {{order_id}}.

templates.name: Request Invoice Details
templates.description: Ask customer for invoice number and billing period to investigate invoice error.
templates.reply_body_template: To investigate the invoice discrepancy, please provide invoice number {{invoice_number}} and billing period {{billing_period}}.

templates.name: Request Account Verification
templates.description: Ask customer to verify account ownership via registered email or last four of payment method.
templates.reply_body_template: For security, please confirm your registered email {{registered_email}} and last four digits of payment method {{last_four_payment}}.

templates.name: Request SSO Configuration
templates.description: Ask customer for SSO provider name and tenant ID to debug SSO issue.
templates.reply_body_template: To troubleshoot your SSO issue, please provide the SSO provider name {{sso_provider}} and your tenant ID {{tenant_id}}.

templates.name: Request API Error Details
templates.description: Ask for API endpoint, error code, and request ID to investigate technical issue.
templates.reply_body_template: Please provide the API endpoint {{api_endpoint}}, error code {{error_code}}, and request ID {{request_id}} so we can investigate.

templates.name: Request Reproduction Steps
templates.description: Ask customer for steps to reproduce the reported bug.
templates.reply_body_template: To reproduce the issue, please describe the steps: {{reproduction_steps}}. Also confirm your browser or client version: {{browser_or_client}}.

templates.name: Request Security Incident Details
templates.description: Ask for IP address, timestamp, and affected account for security investigation.
templates.reply_body_template: For our security investigation, please provide the IP address {{ip_address}}, incident timestamp {{incident_timestamp}}, and affected account {{affected_account}}.

templates.name: Request Shipping Details
templates.description: Ask for tracking number and shipping address to investigate shipping issue.
templates.reply_body_template: To look into your shipping issue, please provide the tracking number {{tracking_number}} and shipping address {{shipping_address}}.

templates.name: Billing Issue Resolved
templates.description: Close a resolved billing ticket (refund, invoice, or charge issue).
templates.close_body_template: Your billing issue has been resolved. If you have further questions, please open a new ticket.

templates.name: Technical Issue Resolved
templates.description: Close a resolved technical ticket (bug, API, or integration issue).
templates.close_body_template: Your technical issue has been resolved. If the problem recurs, please open a new ticket with updated details.

templates.name: Account Issue Resolved
templates.description: Close a resolved account ticket (password, SSO, or lockout issue).
templates.close_body_template: Your account issue has been resolved. For security, we recommend updating your credentials.

templates.name: Security Issue Resolved
templates.description: Close a resolved security ticket after investigation is complete.
templates.close_body_template: The security investigation is complete and the issue has been resolved. Affected systems have been secured.

templates.name: Shipping Issue Resolved
templates.description: Close a resolved shipping ticket (delay, tracking, or lost package).
templates.close_body_template: Your shipping issue has been resolved. You can track your updated shipment status using the provided tracking link.

templates.name: Close Spam/Marketing
templates.description: Close a ticket identified as spam or unsolicited marketing.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed as non-actionable: spam or marketing content.

templates.name: Close Benign/Expected Behavior
templates.description: Close a ticket where the reported behavior is expected and requires no action.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed: the reported behavior is expected and requires no corrective action.

templates.name: Close Automation False Positive
templates.description: Close a ticket generated by a false positive from automated monitoring.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed: automated alert was a false positive. No action required.

templates.name: Close Data Error
templates.description: Close a ticket caused by a data error in ticket generation.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed: generated from a data error. No customer action needed.

templates.name: Close No Response Needed
templates.description: Close a ticket that is informational and requires no response.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed: informational only, no response required.

templates.name: Close Duplicate
templates.description: Close a ticket that is a duplicate of an existing ticket.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed as duplicate. This issue is being tracked in the original ticket.

templates.name: Close Feature Request
templates.description: Close a ticket that is a feature request misfiled as a support issue.
templates.close_body_template: Thank you for the suggestion. This has been forwarded to our product team as a feature request.

templates.name: Close No Response
templates.description: Close a ticket due to no customer response within SLA window.
templates.close_body_template: Ticket closed due to no response. Please reopen if you still need assistance.
